soccer.example: I play soccer with my friends after school every day!

basketball.example: Basketball is fun! I love shooting hoops at the park.
basketball.position: point guard, shooting guard, center, forward

tennis.example: Tennis players hit the ball over a net with a racket.

baseball.example: Baseball has batting, pitching, and running around the bases!

swimming.example: Swimming is great exercise and feels like flying in the water!

running.example: Running makes my heart strong and my legs fast!

gymnastics.example: Gymnasts do flips, handstands, and balance on beams.

volleyball.example: Volleyball players hit the ball over the net without letting it touch the ground.

skating.example: Ice skating is fun! You glide on the ice with special boots.

skiing.example: Skiing down a snowy mountain feels like flying!

surfing.example: Surfers ride big waves in the ocean on a surfboard.

cycling.example: Cycling is a fun way to explore new places!

martial_arts.example: Martial arts teach discipline, respect, and self-defense.
martial_arts.types: karate, judo, taekwondo, jiu-jitsu, kung fu

dancing.example: Dancing is a sport and an art! It makes you strong and happy.

climbing.example: Rock climbers use their hands and feet to go up walls.

hockey.example: Hockey players hit a puck with a stick to score goals.
hockey.types: ice hockey, field hockey, roller hockey

golf.example: Golf players hit a small ball into holes with different clubs.

boxing.example: Boxing is a sport where two people punch each other with gloves.

fishing.example: Fishing is a relaxing sport where you try to catch fish.

cheerleading.example: Cheerleaders shout, dance, and do stunts to cheer for teams.
